mechanism_narrative: A stronger 3-month growth rate in retail sales signals accelerating household demand and near-term revenue momentum for listed firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest RSAFS value is 473808.0 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth has Rank IC below 0.03 for 20-day S&P 500 returns over any 3-year rolling window or top-quintile signals do not outperform bottom-quintile signals.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate rises by more than 25 basis points over 3 months, the discount-rate shock lowers the present value of equity cash flows and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest FEDFUNDS value is 0.91 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if triggered instances have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns more than 60% of the time or if mean triggered returns are not below unconditional mean returns at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in the unemployment rate signals weakening labor income and rising recession risk, causing equity investors to lower earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest UNRATE value is 4.3 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if 60-day forward returns following UNRATE increases above 0.3pp are not lower than non-triggered returns, or if the downside hit rate is below 55% in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production over 3 months signals improving real output and operating leverage for cyclical firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest INDPRO value is 105.0284 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if positive INDPRO 3-month growth crossings fail to produce above-baseline 20-day S&P 500 returns or if the signal Rank IC is negative in two consecutive 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: When CPI rises faster while the federal funds rate also rises, equities face simultaneous margin pressure and tighter discount rates, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month inflation rate rises and FEDFUNDS rises > 0.25pp in 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest CPIAUCSL value is 243.846 and latest FEDFUNDS value is 0.91
failure_condition: Reject if the joint CPIAUCSL-FEDFUNDS trigger does not underperform either single-series trigger or if triggered 60-day returns are positive in more than 55% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in housing starts over 3 months signals weakening interest-sensitive demand and future construction-related earnings, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest HOUST value is 1172.0 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST declines below the trigger are followed by 60-day S&P 500 returns above the unconditional median in more than 55% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: When payroll employment rises while unemployment falls, broad labor-market strength supports income growth without an immediate recession signal, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest PAYEMS value is 146135.0 and latest UNRATE value is 4.3
failure_condition: Reject if the joint payrolls-up unemployment-down condition has 5-day forward returns no higher than the unconditional mean or if its hit rate is below 52% in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: When real GDP growth is positive and retail sales growth is positive, aggregate demand is broad enough to support earnings revisions, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter growth > 0 and RSAFS 3-month growth > 0
evidence_refs: fact:latest GDPC1 value is 16861.6 as of t-5mo
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive GDPC1 and RSAFS condition fails to generate 60-day returns above the unconditional mean by at least 50 basis points, or if Rank IC is below 0.03.
